heroLead: Every page you read leaves a breadcrumb. Highlight text on any page, right-click Save to Breadcrumb, and months later find it again with a plain-language search — powered by on-device AI, with zero data leaving your browser.
featuresTitle: A searchable memory of everything you learn
featuresLead: Capture highlights, search by meaning, and watch your learning trail grow over time.
featureCaptureBody: Highlight text on any page, right-click Save to Breadcrumb. Stores the text, URL, title, and timestamp.
featureSearchBody: Full-text keyword matching and semantic similarity blended into one ranked list.
featureOnDeviceBody: Embeddings run locally with Transformers.js. No servers, no accounts, fully offline.
featureSimilarBody: When you save something, Breadcrumb surfaces related things you saved before.
featureTimelineBody: A month-by-month breakdown of what you've been learning.
featureTopicsBody: Notes are auto-tagged — AWS, Kubernetes, AI, Rust — for filtering and the timeline.
sceneSearchAlt: Searching saved notes in the popup
sceneTimelineCaption: See what you learned each month
showcaseTitle: Find ideas even when you forget the words
showcaseBody: Imagine six months from now. You vaguely remember reading something about Kubernetes autoscaling, but not where, when, or in which article. Open Breadcrumb, search for Kubernetes autoscaling, and it brings back the AWS article from March, the YouTube tutorial from April, and your own highlighted note, all in one place.
showcaseCaption: Hybrid search runs entirely in your browser
privacyTitle: Your notes stay on your device
privacyPoint1: Only reads text you select and the current tab title/URL when you save
privacyPoint2: No browsing history, no background page reading, no host permissions
privacyPoint3: No accounts, analytics, or cloud — the AI model ships inside the extension
privacyPoint4: Everything stays in your browser until you delete or export it
privacyCtaLead: Ready to build your learning trail?
